case_title: STEFAN STEFANOV VS. ALICIA REINA GREENLEAF

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-10-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEFANOV, STEFAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENLEAF, ALICIA REINA $1,229.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,259.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GREENLEAF, ALICIA REINA
